title: Employee Information System
description: Build employee master data in one system, with AI reports on departments, employment types, and compensation structure.
description_cn: 员工信息系统沉淀组织主数据，结合 AI 报告分析部门分布、雇佣类型和薪酬结构。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Employee Information System: an employee directory, department filtering, employee profile details, and a CEO-view workforce-structure analysis report. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/42-employee-information.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 员工信息系统：员工目录、部门筛选、员工档案详情和 CEO 视角人力结构分析报告。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/42-employee-information.html
